SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.title: Trouble Maker
SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.description: Show 2 random other event cards. Choose 1 to play immediately. Gain {StarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
SKILL_TROUBLE_MAKER.select_prompt: Choose an event card to play
EVENT_ANGELS_DESCENT.title: Angel's Descent
EVENT_THUNDER_STRIKE.title: Thunder Strike
EVENT_FOOD_SAFETY.title: Food Safety
EVENT_RED_HEAT_WARNING.title: Red Heat Warning
EVENT_FIGHT_FUN.title: Fight, Fun!
EVENT_FIGHT_FUN.description: Give each ally a [card]Giant Rock[/card] card ([exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust]+[ethereal]Ethereal[/ethereal]).
EVENT_CROWDED_PASSAGE.title: Crowded Passage
EVENT_GIFT_FROM_SKY.title: Gift from Sky
EVENT_GIFT_FROM_SKY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) for all allies and gain {StarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
EVENT_HAND_ERASE.title: Hand Erase
EVENT_HAND_ERASE.description: Discard the rightmost card from all allies' hands.
EVENT_SPRINT.title: Sprint
EVENT_EQUALITY.title: Equality
EVENT_EQUALITY.description: Set all allies' HP to 1 and gain {Block:diff()} [blue]Block[/blue].
EVENT_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
EVENT_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.description: Choose 1 event card other than [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] and play it twice.
EVENT_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.select_prompt: Choose an event card to play twice
EVENT_PLAYER_REPRESENTATIVE.title: Player Representative
EVENT_PLAYER_REPRESENTATIVE.description: Only you make a judgment. On 1-3, you take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage and teammates take {TeamDamage:diff()} damage; on 4-6, you gain {SelfStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold] and teammates gain {TeamStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
SKILL_FAMOUS_BLADE.title: Famous Blade
SKILL_FAMOUS_BLADE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. After playing this, consume up to 2 [power]Sword Aura[/power]. For every 2 [power]Sword Aura[/power] consumed across this run, permanently increase this card's damage by 1. Then gain 1 [power]Sword Aura[/power].
SKILL_STAR_SHOP.title: Placeholder
SKILL_STAR_SHOP.description: A placeholder card generated by [relic]Persona: Samurai Prawn[/relic]. It has no effect yet.
